item.text: {"concept":"throw","verdicts":[{"candidate":"A","verdict":"LOSSY","missing":"It omits rapid arm-and-wrist propulsion, carrying only an unspecified body part and wrongly requiring the object to move and end far away.","quality":1,"reason":"The action-causing-motion genus is present, but it does not distinguish throwing from kicking or other bodily propulsion and makes distance essential."}]}
